title: User asks why a PO can't be closed — bot diagnoses a pending GR
user_persona: Buyer frustrated that a PO won't close at quarter end

conversation.user: Why can't I close PO-2026-1450? I tried short close and it said no.

bot_must: fetch PO-2026-1450 status, lines, and receipt situation
cross-module query GR for in-progress GRs against this PO
diagnose specific blocker — common ones: (a) line has GR in 'draft' status not yet posted, (b) line has open milestone, (c) PO is on Hold and needs unhold first, (d) line has open Inspection
report the exact blocker and what to do

expected.cross_module_query: GR-search by status=Draft and source PO=PO-2026-1450
bot_must: list the draft GR(s) by GR number, warehouse, who created
explain user needs to either post the draft GR (in GR module) or cancel it before short-close will work

conversation.user: If I cancel that draft GR can I then short close?

bot_must: confirm yes — once the draft GR is cancelled, the line balance becomes available for short close
note that cancelling a GR is in the GR module, not PO module
offer to walk through after the user has cancelled it

evaluation_metrics.diagnostic_depth: bot identifies specific blocker, not generic 'unknown reason'
evaluation_metrics.cross_module_dependency_explained: bot explains GR is in a different module and that's where the action must happen
evaluation_metrics.remediation_path_clear: bot tells user the sequence: cancel GR → then short close
